zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Coke於大約1515年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍爾哈姆時，她的父親Robert Coke36歲，母親Ann Woodhouse21歲。她於大約1541年與Thomas Bersham在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯帕哈姆結婚。她去世於1557年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Coke于大约1515年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可霍爾哈姆时，她的父亲Robert Coke36岁，母亲Ann Woodhouse21岁。她于大约1541年与Thomas Bersham在英国英格兰諾福爾可斯帕哈姆结婚。她去世于1557年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Coke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Cook   or   Cocke  .
Americanized form of German   Koke   or   Koch  .

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Coke was born about 1515, in Holkham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Coke, was 36 and her mother, Ann Woodhouse, was 21. She married Thomas Bersham about 1541, in Sparham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She died before 1557.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Coke est née environ 1515, à Holkham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Coke, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ann Woodhouse, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bersham environ 1541, à Sparham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée avant 1557.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Coke um 1515 in Holkham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Coke 36 und ihre Mutter Ann Woodhouse 21. Sie hat um 1541 in Sparham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Bersham geheiratet. Sie starb vor 1557.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Coke è nata il circa 1515 nel Holkham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Coke, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ann Woodhouse, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bersham circa 1541, nel Sparham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì prima del 1557.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Cokeが約1515年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホールクハムで生まれた時，父Robert Cokeは36歳，母Ann Woodhouseは21歳であった。約1541年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスパーハムでThomas Bershamと結婚した。彼女は1557年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Coke(이)가 대략 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 홀카에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Coke(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Woodhouse(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스파람에서 Thomas Bersham(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1557년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Coke nasceu aproximadamente 1515, em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Coke, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ann Woodhouse, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bersham aproximadamente 1541, em Sparham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu antes 1557.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Coke родилась около 1515 г. в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Coke было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Woodhouse, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bersham около 1541 г. в местности спарам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла перед 1557 г.
